sources.type: long-form Founder Story interview (Pitango VC publication)

research_notes.selected_from: Doc 1 — research-recommended candidate; Pitango ~1,500 words verified by web_fetch
research_notes.verification: Pitango Founder Story fetched 2026-05-09. WebFetch summarized to ~250 verbatim words across multiple sections. Combined here.
research_notes.linkedin: Headline 'CEO & Co-Founder at Finout' assumed; About not yet collected (using marker pattern).
research_notes.track_decision: depth (Track B). WebFetch summarization limits effective verbatim recovery from Medium/long-form pieces; consistent constraint across Buildots, Aquant, and now Finout.
research_notes.different_from_buildots_and_aquant: Different positioning: efficiency/cost-management (Cash axis primary), 3-pillar mechanism framing ('Analyzing the past, Predicting the future, Democratizing FinOps'). Tests whether playbook discriminates 3 distinct positioning archetypes.
research_notes.expected_principles_pre_test: DELIBERATELY OMITTED. No pre-anchoring. Will compare extraction + synthesis post-hoc.
